title: Mexican Crispy Corn Fritters
description: A crispy and savory twist on traditional corn fritters, infused with Mexican flavors. Serve as a snack or side dish.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together cornmeal, crushed crisps, and salt.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together beaten egg and chopped with.
3. Add chopped pickles to the egg mixture and stir to combine.
4. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
5. Heat about 1/2 inch of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
6. Using a spoon, drop small balls of the batter into the oil, about 1/4 cup each.
7. Flatten each ball slightly with a spatula.
8. Cook for about 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
9. Remove from oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
